A foreman completed the installation and also did a quick roof inspection (which was included with the vent installation). The work was finished in under an hour, which was efficient . Especially considering it was done on a rainy day. While I do feel for the person working in those conditions, the job was completed as promised.

The inspection was documented with photos provided afterward, which I appreciated.

I did raise a separate concern about a known leak on the shed roof and mentioned this to both John and the foreman. Unfortunately, the foreman was unable to identify it, likely because the inspection photos were taken from ground level. If I hadn’t already been aware of the issue, this leak could have been easily missed and potentially caused more damage over time.

It’s still too early for me to comment on the long-term quality of the vent installation. However, I did notice that leftover cut roofing and plywood pieces, with nails still attached, were left in the attic. This could be a safety concern for anyone working in the attic later on.

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Simon Hardy-Francis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUB8AdQYxUYJCAE_cHqFT87JPS7eQsmUoL3mGal92dnU64RGEWt=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Why we opted for James Hardie (JH) fiber cement siding and hired Ideal Siding (IS) to install it:

We wanted to replace our current wooden siding with a zero maintenance siding solution including not having to paint it for a very long time.

JH fiber cement siding comes pre-painted with a special factory-bake-on-paint process which they say lasts much longer but is tricky to install.

JH advertise a list of "ELITE PREFERRED" contractors, and we picked IS because they are likely the biggest residential JH installer in North America.

What we liked about IS:
They did renderings of what the house would finally look like to help us figure out which JH products and colours to use on which bits of house.

What we did NOT like about IS:
We had to be on them to clean up at the end of each day not to leave piles of old wood with nails sticking out dangerously everywhere.
Unlike regular contractors they turned up later -- mid to late morning -- and insisted on working later, often working one to two hours in the dark.
AFAICT IS does not have any in-house install crews, and just subcontracts out jobs to non-IS installers.
During the install, the IS subcontracted installer (ISSI) for our job tried to sell his services to my neighbors on the street, cutting out IS as the middleman.
The ISSI had 10 years of install experience but we noticed they installed the JH material partially incorrectly according to the online PDF JH installation manual.
About this: IS said the manual is only a suggestion. JH staff said off-the-record they would not accept this if it was their house, and on-the-record, they cannot get involved with the quality of the work of their "ELITE PREFERRED" contractors.
The ISSI had the wrong type of ladders (rests on gutters and not roof next to gutters) for this work and scraped and dented our relatively new gutters everywhere.
We had some internet and TV cables going around the front of the house. IS just left the cables dangling on the ground and left it up to us to re-attach them.
IS installed unwanted, unfinished wood around three doors instead of JH material and said it's our job to finish and paint it.
The initial install looked very shabby and IS wanted to be paid and said the quality is normal. So we had to argue with them to improve the quality.
Note: All attached photos are after IS did several rounds of touching up, and is what they consider finished.
Had we asked IS to re-install some of the material properly then it would likely have resulted in legal action which we didn't want.
In the end IS got in an expert to touch up a lot of the worst parts, which turned into a lot of painting, e.g. most of the white JH trim is now unwantedly painted.

This means we're going to face extra costs down the road, because all the touched-up and painted material is going to weather differently to the JH baked-on paint.
Again IS said they were finished a second time and wanted to be paid, and we had to point out remaining issues on every side of the house.
In the end IS presented us with an inflated bill with surprising and strange extra items e.g. it's extra to replace siding on the porch pillar because "it is not part of the house"!
The entire job should have taken a month but end to end took 3.5 months due to discussions and waiting for the weather to improve for the very many touch-ups.

Conclusions:
The JH "ELITE PREFERRED" contractors list is just marketing and has little to do with the quality of the work, and JH will not get involved in any disputes.
I would trust IS to do a simple JH plank install on a simpler boxy home, but if you have a more custom home or other JH materials they will be out of their depth and you won't be happy.
In the end I wouldn't install JH materials at all unless I was 100% sure that the installer is up to the job because it's not easy material to install.

To check for install quality then a drive by a reference home is insufficient; you cannot see nail heads etc from the street. You need to walk up to the house, and get the owners to dish up a reference about their install experiences.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDRht2vEg&fid=0x0:0x9dde6f47443e9808"],"When":"2023-4-23"},{"Name":"Janette Martin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVewSMfo7IZ4VDftgBCeiXxiJBk-e8mm9HTP89fGzM9SXcY454=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ideal Siding did an excellent job and I would recommend them to anyone. They had a team of people and had the whole job done in about a week. They did beautiful work. They provide excellent services. They're a local franchise business and they work to really meet your needs.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgID2mrH-8AE&fid=0x0:0x9dde6f47443e9808"],"When":"2022-5-12"},{"Name":"Palle Pita","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKEfxq5QMLhG0U-Cn9MAkdnPXdQnatTv50forL4dyQC9FXhfrI=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Great Service. By the end of the day, I had a copy of a very detailed quote that included the scope of work to be done, including all the details of the type of shingles to be applied, vents, flashing, finishes, warranty, etc…

The start of the job was delayed by a few weeks due to rain.  The crew arrived at 7am on the day the job started.  They laid out tarps around the perimeter of the property to protect the plants and walkway.  By noon, the entire roof had been stripped off and they started applying new plywood. If you can't be respectful maybe stay off people's private property.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Andrew H","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLaldCb0AtKU_aCVFLcrbxjeeBIDp_a1szZ6w2kCBLRYWkQzw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"Had them come through in the summer to clean the moss off roof and clean gutters. I was able to disconnect sections of the downspouts and clear it out (in the pouring rain as the gutters were overflowing). Everything is flowing now, so lucky didnt clog up my drain tile. Hope in the future they pay more attention to getting all the cleaned up moss from the roof out of the gutters, and putting the downspout filters back on (i assume the guy tossed mine, had to buy new ones).","Images":null,"When":""}]

They did great work and I'd call them again without hesitation.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Debbie Calicetto","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL8YMiaFtvwMCmTOtPRlqybF5afkdzSqS3OOr3jbYy8x5HvFw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I recently had the pleasure of working with Up and Up Roofing for a roof replacement project, and I couldn't be more impressed with the exceptional service they provided. From start to finish, their team demonstrated professionalism, expertise, and a commitment to excellence that exceeded my expectations.

First and foremost, the communication throughout the entire process was outstanding. From the initial consultation to the completion of the project, the team kept me informed every step of the way. They took the time to thoroughly explain the scope of the work, answer all of my questions, and address any concerns I had, which gave me peace of mind and confidence in their abilities.

When it came to the actual installation, the crew was punctual, efficient, and incredibly skilled. They arrived on time each day, worked diligently to complete the project in a timely manner, and paid meticulous attention to detail to ensure that every aspect of the roof was installed correctly. Their expertise was evident in the quality of their workmanship, and I have full confidence that my new roof will provide years of reliable protection for my home.

In addition to their technical proficiency, they treated my property with the utmost respect, taking care to minimize disruption to my daily routine and thoroughly cleaning up the work site each day before they left. Their commitment to customer satisfaction was evident in every interaction, and it was truly a pleasure to work with such a dedicated and friendly group of professionals.

Overall, I cannot recommend Dimitri and his company highly enough. Their exceptional service, quality workmanship, and commitment to customer satisfaction set them apart from other roofing companies, and I would not hesitate to hire them again for any future roofing needs. If you're looking for a reference just come check out our new roof - we love it!

Sincerely,
Debbie","Images":null,"When":""}]

Although the final product is good, the process was horrible and I can’t recommend them. Communication with Sukh started strong, until the project began and he became less responsive. Numerous problems arose such as the workers causing 4 cracks in our ceilings and punching two holes straight through the drywall. This led to subcontractors to repair the damage, and they were ill equipped, not even using drop sheets or cleaning up their mess. All sorts of debris was left by the crew who then challenged us on what they would take away to dispose of. Their workmanship was second to none and I called on them again to clean some moss on my roof, paint my house, change the gutters, and repair a considerable amount of facia and other exterior boards which had become rotten and weathered over the years.  This job involved a considerable amount of effort and attention to detail and Antonio and Marcos did a top notch job and worked long hours in the hot sun to complete the task.  Another Navco crew replaced all the gutters and downpipes in a day or so and the gutters look great and are a significant improvement over what I had previously. Edgar quoted me a fair price and I received very good value for my money. Trust is extremely important to me and these guys have never let me down.  In addition to the quality of workmanship, they used safe working standards when on the roof and they cleaned the worksite every night and at the end of the job and on top of that, the crew were all very personable, respectful, and easy to deal with. title: Mariposa Homes Inc
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Brenda Gable","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLNE0lE1WivpChsUElo03LmrSkqz__6DyJlw0ZOoWxLnhJRqA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Typically, we prefer to hire a contractor that we, or someone we know, have had experience with in the past.  As we wanted a General Contractor to undertake a full basement renovation and we had no one to turn to, we contacted Mariposa Homes who had recently moved into our neighbourhood.  The project has now been completed and we are thrilled with the results.  Jason and Ben from Mariposa are an incredible team.  They are efficient, professional, respectful and skilled.  As we have an older home, they were required to be flexible and resourceful in determining alternative solutions as we discovered  impediments along the way.  We were also extremely pleased with their extended team of sub-contractors.  We can’t thank Jason and Ben enough and would highly recommend Mariposa Homes if you are considering a renovation to your home.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kerith Runnels","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocInZZyDaY1qvozrnigsFzBM1q8cwIbBd82S53IALbhoOWsiBw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jason at Mariposa homes did a great job managing my project.  I needed a basement taken from completely unfinished to partially finished.   This was a little bit of an odd request, but Jason was more than willing to work with me on the idea.  Jason and his team did the framing, rough in plumbing and electrical, insulation, windows, and wallboard.  The project was on time and mostly on budget.  There were a few approved changes, one un-expected event, and small overages that increased the cost a bit.   I was kept up to date on all the goings on, and everyone who came on my property was experienced and respectful.  I would definitely use Mariposa homes again, and recommend them to anyone looking for remodeling work.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Leo Atkins","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVX4eOUQartNXc9fbyQ3Y-a2DaopCl3zoG9w39363SLwBjP3uBi=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Mariposa was the right choice for our home renovation. From day one they were courteous and professional. Mariposa executed our plans to perfection and communication was very clear through the entire project while expectations were set and met with no surprises. Through the course of our renovation we made changes and Mariposa was able to accommodate our requests. In the end the renovation was exactly as desired and we couldn't be happier.

I can confidently recommend Jason & Ben for any project and they are welcome back to my new home for a beverage on the patio anytime.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"andrew tung","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJIaRLuIi4fWKX5F92jvfRjeOpICMoY2HBguTm7S6aVRf9bTg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jason and Ben did an amazing job transforming my backyard and deck into a more usable space year round. The project was larger than anything we've done before so we knew we had to hire a professional. I decided to go with Mariposa Homes because I really appreciated Jason's timely and professional response. We met on several occasions to discuss what the vision was and Jason was always able to provide different options/things to consider. After agreeing on the plan, Jason's crew began in earnest and the work progressed as per his timeline. Unfortunately the COVID-19 pandemic did slow things down part way through; but Jason was always upfront and communication was never a problem. The contractors that work with Mariposa are also top notch and I cannot say enough about their professionalism and attention to detail. They always cleaned up after the end of the day and were good with waste disposal. Whenever I did spot something, Jason was always quick to reach out to his contractors and the issue was rectified the next day. I applaud Jason's attention to detail and honesty with his customers. At the end of the day, my wife and I are extremely happy with Mariposa Homes and would not hesitate to use them again or to recommend them!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Michelle Srdanovic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLnluhCIvdJIgIiwYwXoinvB1j8m28obRtnAfD-Dz3NkWMltA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We undertook a major renovation with Mariposa Homes based on a word-of-mouth recommendation. Jason and Ben have been trustworthy, responsive, and hand-on and we would not hesitate to work with them again on our next project.

Given they work as a team, we appreciated the strength in numbers - it was like having two general contractors in one. They were detail oriented - for example, Jason noticed some finishing work that wasn't up to his standard and I didn't even have to ask about it - he had asked for it to be redone. They were also organized - every two weeks, Ben had an invoice copy printed and ready for our records.

Both were exceptional at communicating with us, especially when problem-solving a bump in the road (as to be expected). They also led a group of professional sub-contractors to complete our renovation and produce quality finishing work. I was able to meet everyone - from the electrician to the plumber, and they were all skilled and informative. Jason and Ben ensured they executed our plans exactly as discussed.

We couldn't be more pleased, and we will miss having their kind faces at our house regularly (even though we are SO HAPPY the renovation is done).

Thanks Jason and Ben!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"JOEL","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLRYoDT1THJu7E1mgm2_G7IN4CgeyqNDzGxt9oLD6325txyIzrl=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Jason and Benny are both honest and professional. I had two great experiences with Mariposa homes. The first was to renovate a completly unfinished basement and install a master bedroom with window, washroom and laundry room and the other was to build a shed. In both cases they completed the job beyond expectation and within budget.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Salimah Vezmarovic","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJxMHbkxtksonIWVzHfZH-u1kbYIQe0hS1AJvWAjruZh-x8Ug=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an incredible experience working with Mariposa Homes. Jason and Ben went above and beyond! Their attention to detail and knowledge is just what you when taking on a home renovation project. They were always on time and fun to work with! They were prompt with any kind of communication. They are honest and fair and we would be more than happy to work with them again. Highly recommend!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bryan Barr","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLdQALbhT5rZtmkyBsKtZKNfvN_fIOwlw4c9L-TZgMUDYpFag=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"The team was professional and delivered a fantastic finished product. I would highly recommend using them for all your roofing needs!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Matthew Rufh","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVqOKS3v5D5rBwPMNaj1brI3z1RCltpQTq0__agpSHecP91WJsQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I can't express enough gratitude for the exceptional service provided by JJ Roofing! During our unseasonably rainy May, a raccoon caused significant damage to our roof overnight, resulting in a major leak. We were in a panic, it caused water damage and maybe could’ve led to further issues.

JJ Roofing was able to come out the very next day. Their prompt response and professional demeanor immediately put us at ease. Jas efficiently assessed the damage, and got to work right away. He patched up the leak, ensuring our home was protected from the ongoing rain.

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Joe Yeung Wai Chui","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI_KRunk9AiLiL1s3eFVboH0veN8HcPHzhwWlZLgx_zthUfDA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I was approached by Griffin as a walk by a few months back, I’ve been thinking of updating my roof around the time, so it was perfect opportunity to get a quote from him, in turn he was very knowledgeable and up front, no hidden cost, plus he can guide u to a finance company with low interest if u can’t pay it all at once (we end up didn’t need it, but it was a good option to have)

We scheduled a date, but when it got close the weather wasn’t very stable he was willing to rescheduled to tend to my concern, which I was very appreciated and finally when May comes weather seen to be mush better and we are ready! But he had to push us back a couple of days, which in turn I totally understood.
Anyway, the big dumpster got dropped off, the guy was very nice and gentle that he put wood plank underneath it so it wouldn’t mark my driveway, and the undoing of my old roof began!!! The guys was very efficient and careful, they even got the water barrier down the first day, second day was a little slow, but they did manage to get more than half done and most of the vents changed, third day was finishing up the shingles and clean up most of the big debris around the house.
On the fourth day it was the new gutters, they did take some time, but it was done just as the sun went down(without the down pipes)
Finally on the fifth day, all the down pipes are connected a little touch up here and there, with the garbage bin hauled away and Griffin did a walk around on the roof with me!

My final thoughts, their installation was very nice, all the flashing and end piece was well placed, exposed nails(for the vents) was sealed with sealer/silicone, my only little little feed back to Griffin was about the final clean up(because that was the sales pitch that got me to go with him) might need a little bit effort, but all in all I am very happy","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEKn7yO-f2qyizgE&fid=0x0:0xe96df3497cf8748c"],"When":"2025-5-11"},{"Name":"Amandah Davis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjU7vj6hIs1gDSgBT53rsY2onXYmJBGVm8ShVulIHTRFAWWJkF8=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Rydel did an incredible job putting the Christmas light on our house! It looks simply magical and my kids love running out to look at the light every night. We are very grateful!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDOjacuH-NnYT39QyOej2J1&fid=0x0:0xe96df3497cf8748c"],"When":"2025-11-8"},{"Name":"Susan Allen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX7-QAXc0WAz8Ox27ga_XQJEE8L9NIqYfk4k9V49TqAGNINuaCK=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"From start to finish we were very happy with the service from the Rydel team. Gabriel worked to help us get the roof on within our budget and Griffin got the team here very quickly to get started. Great communication through the whole project.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Bernie Hadley-Beauregard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUpxmsYqz3VqQWDSnyBN22EmWRLtHmu9SKfqJ6KWImRYyOL1IE=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently had an outstanding re-roofing experience with Rydel Roofing. The Vancouver franchise partner, Griffin Betts and his team were exceptionally professional and demonstrated a stellar work ethic throughout the project. Their pricing was also extremely competitive, making the entire experience top-notch from start to finish.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Betty I","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJj7qRC9V-dg98peGwA-llMwyj9U8EdWPE7800bX2gK041nkw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We contacted Rydel Roofing to repair our 30+ year old roof and are very happy that we did!  It was a very smooth process from start to finish.  We appreciate the thorough attention to detail & great communication provided by Griffin from the initial roof inspection to the final cleanup.  He was professional, knowledgeable & courteous and responded quickly to our emails and answered all questions & concerns we had.

Griffin took the time to show us the options for repairing vs. replacing our roof.  The detailed inspection report with photos identifying the condition of our roof was extremely helpful and the quote was transparent with a very competitive price. We decided to go with the repair and was not disappointed.

The work was completed within 2 days and included all recommended repairs, preventative maintenance & cleaning.  The final inspection report contained a summary with a set of photos clearly showing the work completed.

We appreciate the high-quality work and respectful & supportive communication we received and would not hesitate to recommend Rydel Roofing to others for all their roofing needs.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Paul Champagne","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLNRdmPY1BClQSVXqbwVVrRYxMQBXAboUoSnksO357vRnfLVw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Horrible experience from start  to finish!! Only thing Griffin was ok but his work crew were Horrible....","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Liam Golding","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVNn9UPyvODGjrNsxJVSvvCijwAMI2HkJq27JVxrWx_TZCyG0U=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Griffin is the man! Half the time, they don't show up for work and they constantly postpone the project finish date...really frustrating to work with them from our experience.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"The Voice冷眼看世界","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUm23Cp-J9YOPi7bz-B68NdgoxwzZb94jttK8ccyx83r2ogapSC=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Extremely Disappointed with Mack Kirk Roofing – Unjustified Charges for Minimal Service

On June 23rd, while Mack Kirk Roofing was conducting repairs at our strata in Richmond BC, we approached their on-site crew to briefly inspect mold issues in our bedroom and bathroom ceilings. The workers entered our unit and spent approximately five minutes looking at the affected areas. They suggested the mold might be due to roof leakage and mentioned they would need to conduct further checks and provide a report.

To our surprise, we received an invoice for nearly $500 shortly afterward. The invoice contained only a two-sentence note, with no formal report or detailed findings, and its content contradicted what the workers told us in person. It’s important to note that this quick inspection happened while their team was already on-site for other work — they did not make a special trip from their Langley office for our request.

We contacted their office to respectfully dispute the excessive charge. After waiting nearly two weeks, their response was dismissive, claiming the charge was a “favor” — without addressing any of our specific concerns.

We’re sharing this experience to warn others about what we believe is an unfair and misleading billing practice. If this can happen over a five-minute informal visit, we worry how many others might have faced similar situations over the years.

We strongly urge homeowners and property managers in the Greater Vancouver Area to exercise caution and consider other options before hiring Mack Kirk Roofing.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhATIePShgFztAHOWxpKuKLf&fid=0x0:0x47e73e685c5653de"],"When":"2025-7-22"},{"Name":"Amy Bachmann","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVqIi2NsZjhd2tyH-XzoWmcVuTPrQvog_aGWGG_B4duAtUtcoZ5=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had an excellent experience with Mack Kirk. After deciding on re-shingling the entire roof I asked Scotty to prepare a quote and that I have 3 other contractors coming to prepare quotes.

Once receiving all the quotes it was decided to have Lockhart Roofing carry out the work as even though 3 of the 4 quotes were in the same ballpark I could tell Scotty was professional, approachable and very knowledgeable in his trade.

The work was carried out over a few days due to weather windows by Scotty and his crew who were very polite and hard working. They kept the property very tidy at the end of each day including checking for stray nails from the removal of the older shingles.
The crew always turned up on time and left the roof watertight at the end of each day advising of the next steps.

Since the work has been completed there have been several homeowners and contractors commenting on how good a job was done and asking for their details.

If you are looking for a contractor to work on your homes roof, I highly recommend contacting Lockhart Roofing.

Thank you Scotty and the boys🔨🔨🔨","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgIDD-dWv4QE&fid=0x0:0x6bf9c316751f10d1"],"When":"2024-4-11"},{"Name":"Jorge Castelan","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWam-ysbAcXy4bj2LE2Mg6QX0w5mnYcUqyQtBATlffP5rrMBuue=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After an extensive search and multiple quotes (6), we ultimately chose Lockhart Roofing to redo our roof—and we’re very glad we did. Unlike another top-rated company that tried to create urgency by exaggerating and emphasizing potential damage, Lockhart Roofing focused on facts and transparency.

The job itself was completed efficiently and on schedule. Scotty and his entire crew were professional, respectful, and a pleasure to work with from start to finish. title: Resilience Roofing
user_reviews:
[{"Name":"Eric Jeoun","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIqmizz0JxWatwWuvutsA29a09bil_0ht_HwGO5TiT0K1oezg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My parents wanted to repair the gutters and roof of their home in Coquitlam. After a thorough review, I found Resilience Roofing—and after all the work was done, it’s no surprise they have 5 stars!

Hossein came to give my parents an estimate and also followed up with me since their English is limited. He was very clear about what needed to be done and made an amazing first impression.

My parents told me the team was exceptional. They went above and beyond. Our roof was already 10–15 years old, and when we asked when it would need to be replaced, Hossein said it still had a good 5–10 years left.

We had extensive work done on the gutters and also had the skylight replaced. When the time comes to replace the roof, we will definitely be calling Resilience Roofing again.

Thank you so much for the great work—you guys are the best!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhDAa59MRpE17CVCm3gd4kP6&fid=0x0:0xa7d64a2701bde9e"],"When":"2025-7-19"},{"Name":"Farham K","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJQWSz5AD80ua5CRUOSTL0kcriPlfe3YE47zD1Zu-GDyhtYEQ0=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a phenomenal experience with Hossein and his team. I would strongly recommend them to anyone seeking reliable and professional roofing services.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Glenn Bailey","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUWndFCIwfeV3RzQyUjP2WgHtV4U0_hrjZ8FgFIVjCkFvIp3PQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Hossein and the rest of the Team were all great. The price service and workmanship were all outstanding and I would not hesitate recomending them to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Simon Sukstorf","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIY12Mw055Q5L-Cyyz9lTkhh_mNerBgaKncp-TzZg2OUJXNSg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had an outstanding experience with Resilience Roofing! The owner was an absolute pleasure to work with—professional, honest, and responsive throughout the entire process. The crew arrived on time, completed the job exactly when they said they would, and left our property spotless. Not a single nail or scrap left behind.

The quality of the workmanship was excellent, and the price was more than fair—great value for the level of service and attention to detail we received. It’s rare to find a contractor who delivers on every promise, but this team did just that.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Sandeep Lall","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLqnd2juZO-5dGAaoxjGaM6higxjWTXq_WJ2pdmRsYxmOrWOA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Was noticing some soft spots on the roof and flashing work that needed attention. Called Resilience Roofing and met with Hossein the owner of the company. He came by the house the next day and checked the roof, the attic and vents. Was very thorough with everything. Will for sure recommend to family and friends.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"C J nakane","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLyp3KNWtBHzeVZ6QdR8H0sBGeNx-Yf0xc9OGWdkjFhr_lYFQ=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Mr Gurpal is a very nice guy and easy going so i hired him to repair some rotten fascia boards. He asked me if i wanted to enlarge my gutter downpipe so i agreed to do 2 of them.
His crew came promptly a few days later as promised in the morning but quickly left ? I got a phone call from gurpal 10 min afterwards and he asked for a little more money. I told him i had a cheaper guy waiting so he said ok and went with the agreed quote and came to my house.
They did a very quick  job repairing the fascia boards and enlarging the 2 downpipes.
I had to point out the hole around the downpipe opening which they came back 2 hours later with a cover.
I also had to point out a fascia board that needed some epoxy which they did.
In the end I felt I did not receive all the services we discussed so I felt I overpaid.
Was not a good value for my money.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews: [{"Name":"H Y","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJSeTxBZgsz0cEJV1tTJ462OVNjHKcy2HiAWXBmIV0swdDC7A=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"We had a bad experience with \"ROMA\" .  We live in a large complex with several buildings.  On behalf of Strata, due to a problem in some units, it was decided to correct it without informing the residents properly. This project lasted more than three months and during this time our whole life was disrupted because parts of the wall and two windows were completely removed.  At the beginning of the work, when the staff were moving the large furniture in the bedroom, they damaged the door of the closet so that it could no longer be opened and closed, and also the repositioning of the windows and the repair of the wall were done in a bad way, so that the laces are not in place. It is not fixed and insects come in from the created distance.  I really don't know what the quality of this company's work is in terms of construction, but based on what can be seen from the appearance of the work, It could not be more ugly and tasteless than this. The window frames are badly installed, the window sill is slanted, and the part of the baseboard that they replaced has no harmony with the other parts, as if they found a piece of wood and glued it. There was no way it could be worse than this.  Worst of all, they do not accept that they are responsible for repairing the damage they have caused.  Now we are left with two windows whose nets need to be repaired and a closet with a broken door.  Other neighbors have similar experiences.\n\" I do not recommend this company at all.\"","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Hrithik Bhangu","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIgi6XXs5LNDutz6ea-cmkFs2leyaViyO0gFDKDi9DwjpVx6w=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Igor M","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocK9xKvVPSSS7Rm7QhKq2N1kLjDZI0S47dxTpMlYLFVC3Hy_Fw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""}]

[{"Name":"Karen Woo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLOZ7aowTmg6nYmsapHnTNmRBfe2eaEkYpCOOHiKCyZjtj8rw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Thank you so much to Brian and Dayton for an excellent job that they’ve done to our drywall! They’re friendly, helpful, supportive and their professionalism are over the top! Once they start working, they don’t stop for a second, I don’t think they even have their lunch breaks during their 5 days works on our house. They kept our house so clean after they’re done their work every day. Always go extra miles for what’s the best to us, they even repair some of our walls from previous years resulting from leaking roof. Truly amazing! I would highly recommend this amazing team to all my friends and family! Also big thanks to all the staff at High Mark!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tom","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKVxHhlVcg-tJVQmKkcl3Mgt0_zbFZHjzbAbg-hG4P_PQSlqg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"I just replaced my 20 year old furnace with a new duel fuel heat pump and furnace to take advantage of the $10k rebate. The original quote from Highmark Plumbing required the asbestos testing. Brian provided the remediation quote through Highmark One Call. After he performed the cuts of the holes required for the installation of pipes for the heat pump, he insisted that I sign off on the work prior to him coming back a few days later to remove the staples and repair the damage. I expected that the remediation including repairing all the damage.

When he came to remove and paint over the holes from the staples, he left the ceiling as-is and instead provided a quote that day for ceiling reinstatement as that is not part of the service. This is almost an additional $2000.

Be cautious and get specific clarification on what is included in the work that is quoted. Don’t expect that remediation means that they won’t damage your ceiling with tape that rips off the texture coating. You will get a quote for additional work after you may believe it will be covered as part of the original quote. They may leave ceiling damage as-is. Here is a picture of an example of what is left behind on my ceiling. Instead of a clean cut, you can see the texture is removed around the hole. I have a few other spots where the texture was pulled off by the tape he used.

Don’t sign off on the work until everything is complete.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICn1rzg6wE&fid=0x0:0x1ec52dda7fede3df"],"When":"2024-9-25"},{"Name":"knox woo","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocL6HyN23GQ8ohM3zjo25uW-M7WBFcB9hGIF3UFX5wDqNXRxsw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Shoutout to Brian and Dayton for their incredible services in replacing/repair  of drywall as the result of a large plumbing repair project  done to our house . They were very friendly,fast , super courteous, very professional and did very high quality work . Hands down superior to anyone else and no brainer first choice if anyone looking for drywall and bathroom tile work . Thanks very much Brian for such great work and pease of mind !!
Knox woo","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Crystal Reid","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV-vIOrWhVTqLb47OnPRXEHuKafx2z31_9dU91pAaIUTuwX6Q68XA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had some issues with my bathroom sink leaking. After the plumbers had come in to fix that issue Brian had come in to then patch the drywall and paint to make it as if it never happened. And boy youd never know! An amazing job can't see any lines from the patching, and the paint match was amazing. Just feels so fresh and like nothing ever happened. Thank you so much and for the clear communication and walking me through the process. Grateful for your work!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Janice Jackson","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIrrHnWMuRW6ut94witQmn2SPY1qya4mdCFEJYO22y0F3oynQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Highmark One Call made my house back into a home.  Highmark plumbing did a complete repipe of my house replacing all the poly b pipes. After their job was complete( and it was fantastic) I had to have all the wall and ceiling holes repaired. Brian from One call brought his expertise and a great team to put my house back together. Dayton, Joshua, and Dave had a lot of work ahead of them. They were pleasant to have around and were so understanding with our dogs and cats. Brian was always around to make sure things were going smoothly and done to a high standard. I had so many cut outs on the walls and ceiling including a long channel that went the length of my entire kitchen and family room. Brian redid not just the channel that was cut out but the entire ceiling is BRAND NEW and looks AMAZING. They left my house clean at the end of each day and took time to answer any questions. I would happily recommend Highmark One Call. Thanks for a job well done.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Art Liestman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJyiaUWaMApF9w2X7AcvqgS4B1oMKo4kgYvqVdNWUy6jJXw6g=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We had a leaky old copper drainpipe which damaged the drywall and baseboard around it. They quickly found the leak, determined that there was no asbestos, replaced the pipe, eliminated the black mold, replaced the damaged drywall and baseboard and painted the walls. Brian and Alex were responsive, prompt, professional, polite and tidy.  We would be happy to work with them again but hope we don’t have to.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Laura Shi","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIxXpqCtIyt4WRYFqln4gPhOX2zyTgqBvqAuX1JH3tD-5I6bw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Brian was very careful and patient about what he did even my project was small.
